title: Cold Regions Research and Engineering
text:
Advanced Polar Snow and Terrain Sensing
Deadline— March 9, 2026
ERDC seeks advanced capabilities for sensing and predicting operationally relevant variables in polar and subpolar snowpack and terrain surface stability.
Read MoreAdvanced Polar Snow and Terrain Sensing
Arctic Infrastructure Research Center
Deadline— Continuously Open
ERDC's Arctic Infrastructure Research Center (AIRC) is full-scale testing ground for evaluating solutions that enhance warfighter safety, survivability, and mission readiness in the Arctic.
Read MoreArctic Infrastructure Research Center
Advanced Arctic Radar Remote Sensing
Deadline— March 31, 2025 (Closed)
ERDC seeks solutions enabling research toward advanced radar remote sensing methods, radar instrument development, and associated computational frameworks for more robust terrain characterization in Arctic environments.
Read MoreAdvanced Arctic Radar Remote Sensing
Arctic Infrastructure Construction Advancements
Deadline— January 13, 2025 (Closed)
ERDC seeks solutions enabling the development of advancement tools for more efficient construction in Arctic conditions.
Read MoreArctic Infrastructure Construction Advancements
Snow Remote Sensing and Prediction
Deadline— December 9, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks to collaborate in the development of advanced tools that enable a better applied understanding of and prediction of snow conditions in cold regions environments.
Read MoreSnow Remote Sensing and Prediction
AI-Informed High-Resolution Fuel Mapping
Deadline— October 31, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks advanced artificial intelligence (AI) solutions for mapping wildland fire fuel characteristics in cold regions using variable datasets.
Read MoreAI-Informed High-Resolution Fuel Mapping
Automated Cold Culturing
Deadline— March 8, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks automated lab equipment for culturing microorganisms in cold regions, supporting Department of Defense directives to address biotechnology and enhance warfighting and logistics capability in the Arctic.
Read MoreAutomated Cold Culturing
Extreme Environmental Conditions Simulation
Deadline— July 10, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC is interested in walk-in solutions that can generate severe environmental conditions for testing purposes.
Read MoreExtreme Environmental Conditions Simulation
Frost Effects Research Facility Upgrade
Deadline— June 15, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC invites solutions that will enhance its Frost Effects Research Facility cooling reliability and efficiency.
Read MoreFrost Effects Research Facility Upgrade
